title: CreamTheOtter's Creamer Axolotls!
description: Would you like a smol tiny stinky Creamer? Now you have it!
body:
## Would you like a smol tiny stinky Creamer? Now you have it!


**Creamers is the fan name of Cream Soda(CreamTheOtter)! This resource pack changes Axolotls to look like the Creamers.**


## More Info

me -> ![me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39f22624d329c1cb69b6311dbc2c91cdc18fb3de.jpeg)
